mandatory_legal_checks: Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 — notice and consent requirements (S.5-7)
DPDPA 2023 — data fiduciary obligations (S.8); Data Protection Board of India
IT (Reasonable Security Practices) Rules 2011 — SPDI protection for sensitive personal data
Grievance officer mandatory under IT Act — name, designation and contact must be published
Data localisation — certain categories of sensitive data must be stored in India
